title: JUX-329 Dog Lady Mana Takai
overview: The Takais moved to Tokyo to open a pet shop, a lifelong dream. One day, while they were feeling happy spending every day with their beloved husband and dog, the Tamura couple, who also run a pet shop in the neighboring town, came to visit them. On the surface, it was a greeting from fellow shop owners, but the Tamuras had a plan. "A ruthless and cruel plan to train the dog-women until they lose their rationality as humans and become obedient dog-women who live only by animalistic carnal desires and instincts." And so, the truth behind the Tamura pet shop is revealed...
